  • AUTHENTIC GOJO TOY - The anime figures in the Anime Heroes Jujutsu Kaisen range are accurately based on characters from this popular anime and manga. Gojo Satoru is depicted in his iconic black uniform, showcasing his confident demeanor and distinct style.
  • GOJO SATORU - Gojo Satoru is one of the most powerful Jujutsu Sorcerers, known for his charming personality and unmatched combat abilities. With his unique Limitless technique and the Six Eyes, Gojo plays a crucial role in protecting his students and fighting against powerful curses.
  • 17CM ANIME STATUE - Each anime action figure in this Jujutsu Kaisen range is 17cm tall and has 17 points of articulation, allowing you to play and pose your favourite characters. Use these anime and manga figures to recreate your favourite parts of Jujutsu Kaisen.
  • ADDED ACCESSORIES - In addition to the anime action figures, each box contains personalised accessories specific to the character they depict. Gojo Satoru comes with an extra pair of hands and an energy effect piece representing his Limitless technique, enhancing your display and play options.
  • COLLECT THEM ALL - The anime figurines in this set make excellent anime gifts for the Jujutsu Kaisen collector in your life. Three of the main manga and anime characters are depicted in this Anime Heroes range: Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Gojo Satoru.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    About this Item

    • AUTHENTIC GOJO TOY - The anime figures in the Anime Heroes Jujutsu Kaisen range are accurately based on characters from this popular anime and manga. Gojo Satoru is depicted in his iconic black uniform, showcasing his confident demeanor and distinct style.
    • GOJO SATORU - Gojo Satoru is one of the most powerful Jujutsu Sorcerers, known for his charming personality and unmatched combat abilities. With his unique Limitless technique and the Six Eyes, Gojo plays a crucial role in protecting his students and fighting against powerful curses.
    • 17CM ANIME STATUE - Each anime action figure in this Jujutsu Kaisen range is 17cm tall and has 17 points of articulation, allowing you to play and pose your favourite characters. Use these anime and manga figures to recreate your favourite parts of Jujutsu Kaisen.
    • ADDED ACCESSORIES - In addition to the anime action figures, each box contains personalised accessories specific to the character they depict. Gojo Satoru comes with an extra pair of hands and an energy effect piece representing his Limitless technique, enhancing your display and play options.
    • COLLECT THEM ALL - The anime figurines in this set make excellent anime gifts for the Jujutsu Kaisen collector in your life. Three of the main manga and anime characters are depicted in this Anime Heroes range: Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Gojo Satoru.

    Product description

    Product Description
    In the world of Jujutsu Kaisen, the human population fears and is preyed upon by Curses, evil spirits formed from the accumulated negative emotional energy of mankind. To fight these Curses, Jujutsu Sorcerers use their own Cursed Energy to enhance their bodies and form powerful techniques that allow them to combat these enemies effectively. Gojo Satoru is a highly skilled Jujutsu Sorcerer who guides students like Yuji Itadori and Megumi Fushiguro in their journey to become formidable sorcerers. Each of the anime statues in this Bandai Anime Heroes range is 17cm tall and has 17 points of articulation, allowing you to play and pose your favourite Jujutsu Kaisen characters to retell the stories from the anime and manga. The Jujutsu Kaisen themed box comes with one anime action figure and personalised accessories for each character. With a range of heroes including Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, and Gojo Satoru, Bandai's Anime Heroes are excellent pieces of Jujutsu Kaisen merchandise to start a collection or to give as a gift.
    Directions
